remarks: Rooftop Rear Deck (off Kitchen) with waterview of Mill Pond in East Norwalk! Enjoy the Summer breezes as you dine and relax outside. Walk to East Norwalk train station, Vets Park and SoNo in just a few minutes, get to Calf Pasture Beach, Shady Beach picnic area, Taylor Farm Park, Norwalk Cove Marina, Shorehaven Golf Club (and much more) in a 5-10 minute drive. Great new look; just freshly painted. Unit is in good condition - has good amount of natural light - full-size washer and dryer in unit - good storage space - Gas heat and cooking - 2 off-street parking spaces. No pets/no smoking......While you're viewing #3, also take a look at unit #1 - directly below. Unit #1 is on 1st floor and has no steps if you enter from the front, street-side door.
